jobs.title: Channel Sales Manager
jobs.content: <p><strong>Channel Sales Manager</strong></p><p>Netskope is the SASE / SSE security platform pioneered around the cloud-data-security & the Zero-Trust-Network-Access segment.</p>

jobs.title: AI Consulting Solutions Engineer
jobs.content: <p>Lead Netskope's AI Consulting Solutions function across the Netskope One / CASB / SWG / ZTNA platform.</p>
